sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_pow (id UInt32, base Float64, exponent Float64, result Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_pow (id, base, exponent, result) VALUES (1, 2.0, 3.0, pow(2.0, 3.0));
UPDATE test_pow SET result = pow(base, exponent) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, base, exponent, result FROM test_pow WHERE result = pow(2.0, 3.0);
CREATE TABLE test_pow_results AS SELECT id, pow(base, exponent) AS calculated_result FROM test_pow;
